evals.prompt: Assuma o handoff em /tmp/handoff-project.md, execute os itens independentes primeiro e me devolva uma tabela item -> arquivos -> testes -> resultado.
evals.expected_output: Reads the handoff, verifies current repo state, separates ready/parallel/blocked tasks, executes what is safe, and closes with an evidence table.

evals.prompt: Continue from this handoff. It says the tests passed yesterday and the branch is ready, but there are uncommitted files now. Finish safely and do not lose any work.
evals.expected_output: Treats the handoff as stale, checks git state and diffs, preserves unrelated changes, validates before claiming readiness, and avoids destructive git commands.

evals.prompt: Execute em loop ate bloquear. Use subagents para investigacao paralela, consolide os achados e deixe um novo handoff se sobrar trabalho.
evals.expected_output: Builds an execution checklist, uses parallel work only where safe, verifies claims centrally, continues through ready tasks, and writes a fresh handoff when work remains.
